view.ticketClosed: Ays tikety kaghelatsvats e, aysegh pataskhannerin anjiats en. Ete duk kаriqq tаkayak uneq, azatorinutyan hamdzageq nor tiket bacelay, ev menq uraxutyamb kel onutenk:
view.replyHint: Nor khordinayin okard tiketner steghtselov оgnutsum e mer khmbаyin кarsev hastatatelay ev aveli arag lotsmel:

view.userDislikedReply: Ogtagortsn hashoghagutyan chi dzer pataskhani hamar
